name: Pagination
description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

api.name: Pagination
api.description: Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

parameters.name: SiblingCount
parameters.description: Pages shown on each side of the current page (default 1).

parameters.name: BoundaryCount
parameters.description: Pages always shown at the very start/end (default 1).

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))"
                           Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= _totalPages; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                           OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))"
                       Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private int _currentPage = 1;
    private int _totalPages = 5;

    private void GoToPage(int page)
    {
        if (page >= 1 && page <= _totalPages)
            _currentPage = page;
    }
}

examples.title: Compact
examples.code:
<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Color="muted" Class="px-3 flex items-center">@_currentPage / @_totalPages</Lumeo.Text>
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= _totalPages)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

examples.title: Size
examples.code:
<Segmented @bind-Value="_paginationSize">
    <SegmentedItem Value="sm">Sm</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="md">Md</SegmentedItem>
    <SegmentedItem Value="lg">Lg</SegmentedItem>
</Segmented>

<Pagination>
    <PaginationContent>
        <PaginationPrevious OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage - 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage <= 1)" />
        @for (int i = 1; i <= 5; i++)
        {
            var page = i;
            <PaginationItem IsActive="@(page == _currentPage)"
                            OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(page))"
                            Class="@(_paginationSize switch { \"sm\" => \"h-7 w-7 text-xs\", \"lg\" => \"h-11 w-11 text-base\", _ => \"\"  })">
                @page
            </PaginationItem>
        }
        <PaginationNext OnClick="@(() => GoToPage(_currentPage + 1))" Disabled="@(_currentPage >= 5)" />
    </PaginationContent>
</Pagination>

@code {
    private string _paginationSize = "md";
    private int _currentPage = 1;
}

mdSummary:
# Pagination

Page number bar with prev/next and configurable ranges.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/pagination

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |

| Pagination | Page | `int?` | `` |  |
| Pagination | PageChanged | `EventCallback<int>` | `` |  |
| Pagination | TotalPages | `int?` | `` |  |
| Pagination | TotalItems | `int?` | `` |  |
| Pagination | PageSize | `int` | `10` |  |
| Pagination | SiblingCount | `int` | `1` | Pages shown on each side of the current page (default 1). |
| Pagination | BoundaryCount | `int` | `1` | Pages always shown at the very start/end (default 1). |
| Pagination | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| Pagination | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

| PaginationContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| PaginationContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

| PaginationNext | Disabled | `bool` | `` |  |

| PaginationPrevious | OnClick | `EventCallback` | `` |  |

## Slots
